description_long: This factory building complex consists of several rectangular, multi-story brick structures with flat, concrete roofs and large, industrial-style windows. The facades are primarily composed of red and gray brickwork, with some sections featuring a camouflage-like pattern. The complex includes various industrial elements such as metal fences, utility poles, and what appear to be loading docks and gates. The buildings are arranged in a block formation, with some open spaces between them, and additional smaller structures and equipment are visible around the perimeter. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, typical of mid-20th-century industrial architecture.
description: A blocky, multi-building factory complex with brick facades, flat roofs, large industrial windows, and various industrial fixtures.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the buildings, brick and camouflage-patterned facades, and a row of industrial fixtures and fences.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the main entrances, large industrial windows, and the arrangement of buildings and industrial elements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the plain brick and camouflage-patterned walls, with some industrial equipment visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the buildings, flat roofs, and the overall blocky arrangement of the complex.
